name: Residential Evaluation
short_description: In Residential Evaluation, you’re an evaluator clicking houses to earn points, which can be spent on upgrades to boost points per second and per click. Unlock achievements as you build up your evaluator empire.
detailed_description: This is an engaging clicker game, where you take on property evaluation, increasing your points with each click. Every house evaluation earns you points, which you can spend on upgrades to increase both your points per second and the points per click. Unlock various achievements as you progress. It's a simple experience and it's my first game.
